description: An operator monitors the health and performance of a natural gas compressor station.

nodes.task_description: Monitor real-time operational data from the compressor, including suction pressure, discharge pressure, and engine vibration.

expected_outcome.expected: System displays a live dashboard of compressor health.

nodes.task_description: The system detects an increasing trend in engine vibration levels.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a predictive maintenance alert for the compressor.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for a maintenance crew to inspect the compressor before a failure occurs.

expected_outcome.expected: System schedules a preventive maintenance task.
